name: Toyota Fortuner
description: The Toyota Fortuner is the king of the road in Thailand. Perfect for families or groups who want luxury, space, and power for trips around Pattaya or up to Bangkok.

name: Honda City
description: An economy favorite. The Honda City offers great fuel efficiency and a smooth ride for city driving and coastal trips.

name: Toyota Vios
description: The reliable workhorse of Thailand. The Toyota Vios is easy to park, easy to drive, and extremely reliable.

name: Isuzu D-Max
description: Need to move luggage or sports gear? The Isuzu D-Max is the most popular pickup in Thailand for a reason.

name: Toyota Yaris
description: Compact and agile. The Yaris is the ideal choice for solo travelers or couples exploring Pattaya's busy streets.

name: Mitsubishi Pajero Sport
description: A premium SUV experience with advanced safety features and immense comfort for long distance travel.

name: Honda Civic
description: Sporty and stylish. The Honda Civic is for those who want a bit more performance and modern tech while on holiday.

name: Toyota Camry
description: Our premium executive sedan. The Camry offers the smoothest ride and most rear-seat legroom in our fleet.

name: Ford Ranger
description: Rugged and capable. The Ford Ranger is perfect for those heading out for adventure or carrying heavy loads.

name: Nissan Almera
description: Budget-friendly without sacrificing space. The Almera has a surprisingly large boot for its class.
